history.change: Drop the generic 'Continue where you left off' fallback. Hide the session preview block entirely when no real headline or incomplete task exists.
Hide the redundant 'suggest a project' pill when the earned teaser is showing. One CTA per state, not two competing CTAs.

Drop the precious 'Aperture listens. The thread between what you said reveals itself.' subline. The hook + animated demo + 'start talking' CTA carry the page; the subline was filler that read as marketing.
Empty-state button 'Start one' is ambiguous for a brand-new user — change to 'Start your first project'.

Fix the wrong aria-label on the FAB. It said 'tap to record, hold to choose type' but tap actually opens the typed thought sheet and hold records voice. Replaced with 'New thought — tap to write, hold to record'.
Add aria-label to the three icon-only header buttons (back, search, completed). They had title attributes (hover tooltip) but no aria-label, so screen readers got silence.
Add aria-label to the close (X) button. It had no accessible name.

Section header 'what you're consuming' → 'what you're into'. CLAUDE.md is explicit that lists are identity signals, not consumption logs; 'consuming' was the exact second-brain framing the mantra forbids.
Action result header 'Pattern Revealed' → 'Pattern Found'. Parallels 'Thread Traced' / 'Gaps Found' and drops the cinematic flourish.
Dormancy label 'slipping away' → 'long quiet'. Parallels 'going quiet' and drops the melodrama; 'slipping away' put agency in a weird place.
